overrides.expect: \mathbf {u} _ {i} ^ {t} \mathbf {u} _ {j} = \left(\frac {1}{s _ {i}} A \mathbf {v} _ {i}\right) ^ {t} \frac {1}{s _ {j}} A \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {1}{s _ {i} s _ {j}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} A ^ {t} A \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {1}{s _ {i} s _ {j}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} s _ {j} ^ {2} \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {s _ {j}}{s _ {i}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if i\neq j}, \\ 1 & \text {if i = j}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \mathbf {u} _ {i} ^ {t} \mathbf {u} _ {j} = \left(\frac {1}{s _ {i}} A \mathbf {v} _ {i}\right) ^ {t} \frac {1}{s _ {j}} A \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {1}{s _ {i} s _ {j}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} A ^ {t} A \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {1}{s _ {i} s _ {j}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} s _ {j} ^ {2} \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \frac {s _ {j}}{s _ {i}} \mathbf {v} _ {i} ^ {t} \mathbf {v} _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if $i \ne j$}, \\ 1 & \text {if i = j}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: a _ {i, j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 4, & \text {when} j = i \text {and} i = 1, 2, \ldots , 2 5, \\ - 1, & \text {when} \left\{ \begin{array}{l} j = i + 1 \text {and} i = \left\{ \begin{array}{l} 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 1 1, 1 2, 1 3, 1 4, \\ 1 6, 1 7, 1 8, 1 9, 2 1, 2 2, 2 3, 2 4, \end{array} \right. \\ j = i - 1 \text {and} i = \left\{ \begin{array}{l} 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 1 0, 1 2, 1 3, 1 4, 1 5, \\ 1 7, 1 8, 1 9, 2 0, 2 2, 2 3, 2 4, 2 5, \end{array} \right. \\ j = i + 5 \text {and} i = 1, 2, \ldots , 2 0, \\ j = i - 5 \text {and} i = 6, 7, \ldots , 2 5, \\ 0, & \text {otherwise} \end{array} \right.

a _ {i j} ^ {(k)} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} a _ {i j} ^ {(k - 1)}, & \text {when i = 1,2,\ldots,k - 1 and j = 1,2,\ldots,n + 1}, \\ 0, & \text {when i = k,k + 1,\ldots,n and j = 1,2,\ldots,k - 1}, \\ a _ {i j} ^ {(k - 1)} - \frac {a _ {i , k - 1} ^ {(k - 1)}}{a _ {k - 1 , k - 1} ^ {(k - 1)}} a _ {k - 1, j} ^ {(k - 1)}, & \text {when i = k,k + 1,\ldots,n and j = k,k + 1,\ldots,n + 1}. \end{array} \right.
